chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5662 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.25126/2024 2. For orders on Misc. No.25127/2024 3. For hearing of main case 20.01.2025 Mr. Aftab Akbar, advocate for the petitioner This petition seeks orders against garbage collection station. No infringement of any law is demonstrated before this court neither has any vested right demonstrated to have been accrued. Petition appears to be misconceived hence dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
